source_issue.title: need documentation on customizing print styles

summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue seeks to create or improve documentation on customizing print styles (print.css) for Plone, following a user’s request for clarity on this topic.

## What needs to be done
We need to document how to modify print styles for both Volto and Classic UI. This includes information on creating a CSS file and adding the appropriate link in your HTML, as suggested in comments.

## Helpful background
Key resources to consult include:
- [Custom styling for Volto](https://6.docs.plone.org/volto/theming/custom-styling.html)
- [Classic UI static resources](https://6.docs.plone.org/classic-ui/static-resources.html)
You may also want to review [MDN's guide on printing media queries](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_media_queries/Printing) for a broader understanding.

## Good first steps
1. Familiarize yourself with the provided documents on customizing styles.
2. Read the guidelines for first-time contributors including best practices and things to avoid.
3. Consider drafting a pull request (PR) that adds a small section with examples, if you feel comfortable. Feel free to ask for feedback along the way!
```
